title: Agent Passports: audit every OpenClaw/Hermes action
summary: External agents (OpenClaw, Hermes, Claude Code) can now be enrolled with their own scoped identity: every tool call is recorded as a signed audit node, risky actions require a typed approval code in chat or an in-app confirmation, reversible actions can be undone, and the new DevTools Agent Audit panel shows the full per-agent trail.
